entries.source: We may amend Terms at any time by posting the amended terms on this site. It is your responsibility to review these Terms periodically. Your continued use of the Platform following the posting of revised Terms means that you accept and agree to the changes. You are expected to check this page frequently so you are aware of any changes, as they are binding on you. By continuing to access or use our Service after any revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms. If you do not agree to the new terms, you are no longer authorized to use Service.
entries.value: Pogoji lahko mijenjati v kadar koli postavljanjem spremenjenih uvjeta na to stran. Vaša je odgovornost da redovito pregledate te Uvjete. Vaša kontinuirana uporaba platforme nakon postavljanja revidiranih Uvjeta pomeni da sprejemate in se strinjate z spremembama. Očekuje se da čete to stran često provjeravati tako da ste svjesni bilo kakvih sprememba, jer su oni obvezujuči na vas. Nastavite dostopiti ali uporabljati našu uslugu nakon bilo kakve revizije, se strinjate da čete biti vezani revidiranim pogojima. Ako se ne slažete z novim pogojima, više niste ovlašteni za uporaba storitve.

entries.source: We may disclose personal information that we collect, or you provide: Disclosure for Law Enforcement: Under certain circumstances, we may be required to disclose your Data if required to do so by law or in response to valid requests by public authorities. Business Transaction: If our subsidiaries or we are involved in a merger, acquisition or asset sale, your Personal Data may be transferred. Other cases. We may disclose your information also: to our subsidiaries and affiliates; to contractors, service providers, and other third parties we use to support our business; to fulfil the purpose for which you provide it; to include your company’s logo on our website; for any other purpose disclosed by us when you provide the information; with your consent in any other cases; if we believe disclosure is necessary or appropriate to protect the rights, property, or safety of the Company, our customers, or others.
entries.value: Lahko odkriti osobne podatke ki prikupimo, ali Vam pružiti: Otkrivanje za prtedbu zakona: Pod odredženim okolnostima, od vas se lahko zahtijevati da otkrijete svoje podatke ako to trebate učiniti zakonom ali kao odgovor na važeče zahtjeve javnih vlasti. Poslovna transakcija: Ako su naše podružnice ali mi uključeni v spajanje, stjecanje ali prodaju imovine, vaši osebni podatki mogu biti preneseni. Drugi primerevi. Takodžer lahko odkriti vaše podatke: našim podružnicama in podružnicama; izvodžačima, ponudnikima storitev in drugim trečim osobama ki koristimo za potporu našem poslu; ispuniti namen za koju ga pružate; uključiti logotip Vaše tvrtke na našu spletno stran; v bilo koju drugu namen koju mi objavljujemo ko pružate informacije; uz vašu soglasje v bilo kim drugom primeru; ako smatramo da je odkrivanje potrebno ali primereno za zaštitu prava, imovine ali varnosti podjetja, naših strank ali drugih.

entries.source: We may employ third party companies and individuals to facilitate our Service (“Service Providers”), provide Service on our behalf, perform Service-related services or assist us in analysing how our Service is used. These third parties have access to your Personal Data only to perform these tasks on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose or use it for any other purpose.
entries.value: Mi lahko zaposliti tvrtke in pojedince tretje osebe kako bi olakšali našu uslugu ("Ponudžači storitev"), pružili uslugu v naše ime, obavljali storitve ptezane z storitevma ali nam pomogli v analizi načina korištenja naše storitve. Te treče osobe imaju dostop Vašim osebnim podatkima samo kako bi obavljali te naloge v naše ime in ne bi ga trebali otkrivati ali uporabljati za bilo koju drugu namen.

entries.source: We may provide paid products and/or services within Service. In that case, we use third-party services for payment processing (e.g. payment processors). We will not store or collect your payment card details. That information is provided directly to our third-party payment processors whose use of your personal information is governed by their Privacy Policy. These payment processors adhere to the standards set by PCI-DSS as managed by the PCI Security Standards Council, which is a joint effort of brands like Visa, Mastercard, American Express and Discover. PCI-DSS requirements help ensure the secure handling of payment information.
entries.value: U tom primeru, koristimo storitve trečih strana za obradu plačanja (npr. procesori plačanja). Nebomo pohranjivati ali prikupiti podatke o Vašoj platnoj kartici. Te informacije pružamo izravno našim trečama ki koriste vaše osobne podatke uredžene njihtem Politikom zasebnosti. Ovi procesori plačanja drže se standarda ki je odredio PCI-DSS kao kar upravlja PCI Savjet sigurnosnih standarda, ki je zajednički napor brendova kao kar su Visa, Mastercard, American Express in Discter. PCI-DSS zahtjevi pomažu osigurati siguran rukovanje informacijama o plačanju.

entries.source: We may terminate or suspend your account and bar access to Service immediately, without prior notice or liability, under our sole discretion, for any reason whatsoever and without limitation, including but not limited to a breach of Terms. If you wish to terminate your account, you may simply discontinue using Service. All provisions of Terms which by their nature should survive termination shall survive termination, including, without limitation, ownership provisions, warranty disclaimers, indemnity and limitations of liability.
entries.value: Lahko odmah prekinuti ali suspendirati vaš račun in bar dostop servisu, bez prethodnog najave ali odgovornosti, pod našom jedinom diskrecijom, iz bilo kig razloga in brez omejitev, uključujuči, ali ne ograničeno na kršenje Uvjeta. Ako želite prekinuti svoj račun, lahko preprosto prestati uporabljati uslugu. Sve odredbe Uvjeta ki po njihovoj prirodi treba preživjeti prekid, uključujuči, brez omejitev, vlasničke odredbe, jamstvene odbačaje, isplate in ograničenja odgovornosti.

entries.source: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page. We will let you know via email and/or a prominent notice on our Service, prior to the change becoming effective and update “effective date” at the top of this Privacy Policy. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes. Changes to this Privacy Policy are effective when they are posted on this page.
entries.value: S vremena na vrijeme lahko posodobiti naše Pravilo o zasebnosti. Obavijestit bomo vas o bilo kakvim spremembama postavljanjem nte Politike zasebnosti na to stran. Obavijestit bomo vas putem e-pošte i/ili istaknute obvestila na našoj Usluzi, preden nego kar sprememba postane učinkovita in ažurira „efikasan datum“ na vrhu te Politike zasebnosti. Preporučujemo vam da redovito pregledate to Pravilu o zasebnosti za bilo kakve spremembe. Promjene te Pravila o zasebnosti su djelotvorne ko su objavljene na ovoj stranici.

entries.source: We may use remarketing services to advertise on third party websites to you after you visited our Service. We and our third-party vendors use cookies to inform, optimise and serve ads based on your past visits to our Service.
entries.value: Lahko uporabljati storitve remarketinga za oglašavanje na web stranicama trečih osoba nakon kar ste posjetili našu uslugu. Mi in naši prodavači trečih strana koriste kolačiče za informiranje, optimizaciju in servisiranje oglasa na temelju vaših prethodnih posjeta našoj Usluzi.

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to automate the development process of our Service.
entries.value: Lahko uporabljati trečestranačke ponudnike storitev za automatizaciju procesa razvoja naše storitve.

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to monitor and analyze the use of our Service.
entries.value: Lahko uporabljati ponudnike storitev tretje osebe za pračenje in analizo korištenja naše storitve.

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to show advertisements to you to help support and maintain our Service.
entries.value: Ponudžači storitev tretje osebe mogu Vam pokazati oglase kako bismo pomogli v podršci in održavanju naše storitve.

entries.source: We reserve the right to withdraw or amend our Service, and any service or material we provide via Service, in our sole discretion without notice. We will not be liable if for any reason all or any part of Service is unavailable at any time or for any period. From time to time, we may restrict access to some parts of Service, or the entire Service, to users, including registered users.
entries.value: Pridržavamo se prava na povlačenje ali izmjenu naše storitve, in bilo ki storitve ali materijala ki pružamo putem storitve, v našoj isključivoj diskreciji bez najave. Nebomo biti odgovorni ako iz bilo kig razloga sve ali bilo ki dio storitve nije dostupan v kadar koli ali za bilo ki vrijeme. S vremena na vrijeme, lahko ograničiti dostop nekim dijelovima storitve, ali cjelokupne storitve, na uporabnike, uključujuči registrirane uporabnike.

entries.source: We respect the intellectual property rights of others. It is our policy to respond to any claim that Content posted on Service infringes on the copyright or other intellectual property rights (“Infringement”) of any person or entity. If you are a copyright owner, or authorized on behalf of one, and you believe that the copyrighted work has been copied in a way that constitutes copyright infringement, please submit your claim via email to support@inspir.app, with the subject line: “Copyright Infringement” and include in your claim a detailed description of the alleged Infringement as detailed below, under “DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims” You may be held accountable for damages (including costs and attorneys’ fees) for misrepresentation or bad-faith claims on the infringement of any Content found on and/or through Service on your copyright.
entries.value: Poštujemo prava intelektualnog vlasništva drugih. Naša je politika da odgovorimo na bilo koju tvrdnju da Vsebina objavljen na Usluzi krši avtorske pravice ali druga prava intelektualnog vlasništva ("Kršenje") bilo ki osobe ali subjekta. Ako ste vlasnik autorskih prava, ali ste ovlašteni v ime jednog, in vjerujete da je autorsko djelo kopirano na način ki predstavlja kršenje autorskih prava, molimo vas da predate zahtjev putem e-pošte na support@inspir.app, z temom: “Autonosno kršenje” in uključite v svoju tvrdnju detaljan opis navodnog kršenja kako je opisano v nastavku, pod “DMCA Obavijest in postupak za prava na kršenje autorskih prava” Lahko se smatrati odgovornim za štetu (uključujuči troškte in naknade odvjetnika) za pogrešnu zastupljenost ali krivovjerne trditve o kršenju bilo kig vsebinaa ki se nalazi na i/ili putem storitve na vašem autorskom pravu.

entries.source: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track the activity on our Service and we hold certain information. Cookies are files with a small amount of data which may include an anonymous unique identifier. Cookies are sent to your browser from a website and stored on your device. Other tracking technologies are also used such as beacons, tags and scripts to collect and track information and to improve and analyze our Service. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of our Service. Examples of Cookies we use:Session Cookies: We use Session Cookies to operate our Service. Preference Cookies: We use Preference Cookies to remember your preferences and various settings. Security Cookies: We use Security Cookies for security purposes. Advertising Cookies: Advertising Cookies are used to serve you with advertisements that may be relevant to you and your interests.
entries.value: Koristimo kolačiče in slične tehnologije pračenja kako bismo pratili aktivnost na našoj Usluzi in imamo odredžene informacije. Kolačiči su datoteke z malom količinom podatkov ki mogu uključivati anonimni jedinstveni identifikator. Kolačiči se šalju vašem pregledniku z web-stranice in pohranjuju na vašem uredžaju. Koristi se in druge tehnologije pračenja kao kar su svjetionici, oznake in skripte za prikupljanje in pračenje informacija in poboljšanje in analizo naše storitve. Lahko uputiti pregledniku da odbije sve kolačiče ali napomeni ko se šalje kolačiče. Medžutim, ako ne prihvatite kolačiče, možda nečete moči upotrijebiti neke dijelte naše storitve. Primjeri kolačiča ki koristimo:Sesija Kolačiči: Koristimo kolačiče Sesije za upravljanje našim servisom. Preporuke Kolačiči: Koristimo preferencije Kolačiči za pamčenje vaših preferencija in različitih postavki. Sigurnost Kolačiči: Koristimo Sigurnosne kolačiče za sigurnosne namene. Oglašavanje Kolačiči: Oglašavanje Kolačiči se koriste za serviranje oglasa ki mogu biti relevantni za Vas in vaše interese.

entries.source: We went outside our planet. However, the most rapid and significant advancement was in communication and technology which has connected a global population of over 3 billion people.
entries.value: Medžutim, najbrži in značajniji napredak bio je v komunikaciji in tehnologiji ki je ptezala globalnu populaciju od preko 3 milijarde ljudi.

entries.source: We will retain your Personal Data only for as long as is necessary for the purposes set out in this Privacy Policy. We will retain and use your Personal Data to the extent necessary to comply with our legal obligations (for example, if we are required to retain your data to comply with applicable laws), resolve disputes, and enforce our legal agreements and policies. We will also retain Usage Data for internal analysis purposes. Usage Data is generally retained for a shorter period, except when this data is used to strengthen the security or to improve the functionality of our Service, or we are legally obligated to retain this data for longer time periods.
entries.value: Zadržat bomo vaše osobne podatke samo toliko dugo koliko je potrebno za potrebe utvrdžene tem Politikom zasebnosti. Zadržat bomo in uporabljati vaše osobne podatke v mjeri ki je potrebna za ispunjavanje naših zakonskih obveza (na primer, ako se od vas zahtijeva da zadržimo vaše podatke kako bi bili v skladu z važečim zakonima), riješiti sporte in provoditi naše pravne ugovore in politike. Takodžer bomo zadržati podatke o korištenju za potrebe interne analize. Podaci o upotrebi opčenito se čuvaju kračim razdobljem, osim ko se ti podatki koriste za jačanje varnosti ali za poboljšanje funkcionalnosti naše storitve, ali smo zakonski dužni zadržati te podatke za duže vremensko razdoblje.

entries.value: Dobrodošli v veliku indijsku tvrtku (Držeči partnerstvo firma, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) ("poduzeče", "mi", "naš", "us")! Ovi Pogoji storitve ("Terms", "Terms of Storitev") upravljaju vašom uporabom naše web-stranice smještene na www.inspir.appand aplikacije dostupne na aplikacijskim trgovinama (zajednički ali pojedinačni "Servis") ki upravlja Velika indijska podjetje (Terms, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ).Naša Pravila zasebnosti takodžer upravljaju vašom upotrebom naše storitve in objašnjavaju kako prikupljamo, štitimo in otkrivamo informacije ki su rezultat Vaše uporabe naših web-stranica. Politika zasebnosti dostupna je v inspir.app/zasebnost Vaš sporazum z nama uključuje te Uvjete in našu politiku zasebnosti ("Agregati"). Priznajete da ste pročitali in razumjeli Sporazume in da se slažete z njima. Ako se ne slažete z (ili ne lahko pristati) sporazumima, onda možda ne uporabljate uslugu, ali molimo da nam javite putem e-pošte support@inspir.appso lahko pokušati pronači rješenje. Ovi pogoji primjenjuju se na sve posjetitelje, uporabnike in druge ki žele dostopiti ali uporabljati uslugu.

entries.source: When you create an account with us, you guarantee that the information you provide us is accurate, complete, and current at all times. Inaccurate, incomplete, or obsolete information may result in the immediate termination of your account on Service. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password, including but not limited to the restriction of access to your computer and/or account. You agree to accept responsibility for any and all activities or actions that occur under your account and/or password, whether your password is with our Service or a third-party service. You must notify us immediately upon becoming aware of any breach of security or unauthorized use of your account. You may not use as a username the name of another person or entity or that is not lawfully available for use, a name or trademark that is subject to any rights of another person or entity other than you, without appropriate authorization. You may not use as a username any name that is offensive, vulgar or obscene. We reserve the right to refuse service, terminate accounts, remove or edit content, or cancel orders in our sole discretion.
entries.value: Ko stvorite račun kod nas, jamčite da su informacije ki nam pružate točne, kompletne in aktualne v svakom trenutku. Inaktivirajte, nepotpune ali zastarjele informacije mogu rezultirati neposrednom prekidom vašeg računa na servisu. Odgovorni ste za održavanje povjerljivosti vašeg korisničkog računa in lozinke, uključujuči, ali ne ograničeno na ograničenje dostopa vašem računalu i/ili računu. Pristajete na preuzimanje odgovornosti za sve in sve aktivnosti ali radnje ki se dogadžaju pod vašim računom i/ili lozinkom, bilo da je vaša lozinka uz našu uslugu ali uslugu tretje osebe. Morate nas odmah obvestiti o bilo kakvom kršenjem varnosti ali neovlaštene uporabe vašeg korisničkog imena. Ne smijete uporabljati kao korisničko ime ime druge osobe ali entiteta ali to nije zakonito dostupno za upotrebu, ime ali blagovna znamka ki podliježe bilo kakvim pravima druge osobe ali entiteta osim vas, bez odgovarajučeg odobrenja. Ne smijete uporabljati kao korisničko ime bilo ki uvredljivo, vulgarno ali nepristojno ime. Pridržavamo pravo odbijanja storitve, prekidanja računa, uklanjanja ali uredživanja vsebinaa, ali otkazivanja narudžbi v našoj vlastitoj diskreciji.

entries.source: When you paste notes into AI, ask it to split broad ideas into those jobs. A deck with 18 specific cards is usually better than a deck with 5 giant cards that each contain a whole paragraph.
entries.value: Ko umetnete bilješke v UI, zatražite da podijelite široke ideje na te poslte. Paluba z 18 posebnih kartica je obično bolje od palube z 5 divovskih kartica ki svaka sadrži cijeli pasus.

entries.source: While using our Service, we may also collect the following information: sex, age, date of birth, place of birth, passport details, citizenship, registration at place of residence and actual address, telephone number (work, mobile), details of documents on education, qualification, professional training, employment agreements, information on bonuses and compensation, information on marital status, family members, social security (or other taxpayer identification) number, office location and other data. Payment Data. We may collect data necessary to process your payment if you make purchases, such as your payment instrument number (such as a credit card number), and the security code associated with your payment instrument. All payment data is stored by Razorpay. You may find their privacy notice link(s) here: https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://razorpay.com/privacy
entries.value: Dok koristimo našu uslugu, lahko prikupiti in sljedeče informacije: spol, dob, datum rodženja, mjesto rodženja, detalji putovnice, državljanstvo, registraciju na mjestu boravka in stvarnu adresu, telefonski broj (rad, mobilni), detalje dokumenata o obrazovanju, kvalifikaciji, stručnom osposobljavanju, ugovori o zapošljavanju, informacije o bonusima in naknadi, informacije o bračnom statusu, članovi obitelji, socijalno osiguranje (ili drugi porezni obveznik) broj, mjesto ureda in druge podatke. Lahko prikupiti podatke neophodne za obradu Vašeg plačanja ako napravite kupnje, kao kar je broj vašeg platnog instrumenta (kao kar je broj kreditne kartice) in sigurnosni kod ptezan z vašim platnim instrumentom. Svi podatki o plačanju pohranjuju Razorpay. Lahko pronači njihov obvestila o zasebnosti link(s) tukaj: https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://razorpay.com/privacy

entries.source: While using our Service, we may ask you to provide us with certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify you (“Personal Data”). Personally identifiable information may include, but is not limited to: Email address of Student and Parent First name and last name of Student and Parent Phone number of Student and Parent Address, Country, State, Province, ZIP/Postal code, City School name Class Cookies and Usage Data We may use your Data to contact you with newsletters, marketing or promotional materials and other information that may interest you. You may opt-out of receiving any, or all, of these communications from us by following the unsubscribe link. Usage Data, We may also collect information that your browser sends whenever you visit our Service or when you access Service by or through any device (“Usage Data”). This Usage Data may include information such as your computer’s Internet Protocol address (e.g. IP address), browser type, browser version, the pages of our Service that you visit, the time and date of your visit, the time spent on those pages, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data. When you access Service with a device, this Usage Data may include information such as the type of device you use, your device unique ID, the IP address of your device, your device operating system, the type of Internet browser you use, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data.
entries.value: Dok uporabljate našu uslugu, lahko vas zamoliti da nam date odredžene osobno prepoznatljive informacije ki se mogu uporabljati za kontakt ali identifikaciju (“Osobni podatki”). Osobni prepoznati podatki mogu uključivati, ali nisu ograničeni na: Email adresa studenta in roditelja Ime in prezime studenta in roditelj Telefonski broj studenta in roditelja, Država, Država, provincija, ZIP/Poštanski kod, Gradsko ime šole Klasa Kolačiči in podatki o korištenju Lahko uporabljati Vaše podatke za kontakt z newsletterima, marketingom ali promotivnim materijalima in drugim informacijama ki vas mogu zanimati. Lahko se odlučiti za primanje bilo kakvih, ali svih teh komunikacija od nas slijedečim ptezivanjem. Podaci o upotrebi, Takodžer lahko prikupiti informacije ki vaš preglednik šalje kad god posjetite našu uslugu ali ko dostopite servisu putem ali putem bilo kig uredžaja (“Upotreba podatkov”). Ovi podatki o upotrebi mogu uključivati informacije kao kar su adresa internetskog protokola vašeg računala (npr. IP adresa), vrsta preglednika, verzija preglednika, stranice naše storitve koju posječujete, vrijeme in datum vašeg posjeta, vrijeme prtedeno na tim stranicama, jedinstveni identifikatori uredžaja in drugi dijagnostički podatki. Ko dostopite Usluzi z uredžajem, ovi podatki o primjeni mogu uključivati informacije poput vrste uredžaja ki uporabljate, vašeg uredžaja jedinstvenog ID, IP adrese vašeg uredžaja, vašeg operativnog sustava uredžaja, tipa internet preglednika kig uporabljate, jedinstvenih identifikatora uredžaja in drugih dijagnostičkih podatkov.

entries.source: Worksheet Builder
World capitals

World History at all points of time has been like zooming out of a picture, A picture that kept changing. The centuries leading up to the 19th century marked a turning point in human history, as the world moved from a flat, limited view of the world to a growing understanding of new territories and colonies. The French Revolution marked the first time when a large population gathered to protest and establish the ideals of liberty, equality, and fraternity. The events of World War II also shaped the world for the next century and laid the foundation for the 21st century.
entries.value: Svjetska povijest v svim trenucima bila je kao zumiranje iz slike, slike ki se stalno mijenjala. Stolječima ki su vodila do 19. stolječa obilježila je prekretnicu v ljudskoj zgodovine, jer se svijet preselio iz ravnog, ograničenog pogleda na svijet v sve veče razumevanje nteh teritorija in kolonija. Francuska revolucija je prvi put obilježila ko se velika populacija okupila na prosvjedu in uspostavi ideale slobode, jednakosti in bratstva. Dogadžaji Svjetskog vojne II takodžer su oblikovali svijet za slijedeče stolječe in položili temelje za 21. stolječe.

entries.source: XP & Leveling
xTracking Cookies Data
Yes, but the recommended workflow is hint-first. Use it to understand the method, check your work, and review errors instead of copying a final answer.
entries.value: Da, ali preporučeni potek dela je prvi savjet. Koristite ga da razumijete metodu, preverite vaš rad in pregledajte napake umjesto kopiranja konačnog odgovora.

entries.source: Yes, when it gives hints, checks reasoning, explains mistakes, and asks you to produce the final answer instead of writing it for you.
entries.value: Da, kadar daje namige, preverja sklepanje, razlaga napake in te prosi, da končni odgovor ustvariš sam, namesto da bi ga napisal namesto tebe.

entries.source: Yes. {value1} opens as a public guest learning mode at {value2}, so you can start with a few free guest messages before creating an account.
entries.value: Da. {value1} otvara kao način javnog učenja gostiju na {value2}, tako da lahko začeti z nekoliko brezplačnih poruka gostiju preden nego kar stvorite račun.

entries.source: Yes. A good workflow is to learn the foundation from a trusted lesson source, then use inspir to ask follow-up questions, practise recall, repair misconceptions, and plan what to review next.
entries.value: Da. Dobar rad je učiti temelj iz pouzdanog izvora lekcije, a zatim uporabljati inspir za postavljanje daljnjih vprašanja, vajanje opoziv, popravak zablude, in načrtirati kar sljedeče pregledati.

entries.source: Yes. A school can begin by testing public modes, then move toward a pilot or tailored deployment when the use case, content needs, and funding path are clear.
entries.value: Da. Škola lahko začeti testiranjem javnih načina rada, a zatim se kretati prema pilotu ali prilagodženom rasporedživanju ko su primer upotrebe, potrebe za vsebinaem in put financiranja jasni.

entries.source: Yes. Audience pages link only to public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, and AI-readable discovery files. Private saved chats remain excluded.
entries.value: Da. Stranice publike ptezuju se samo na načine javnog gosta, vodnike, brze pokretanje, učenje staza, in UI-čitljive datoteke za odkrivanje. Privatni sačuvani čavrljanja in dalje su isključeni.

entries.source: Yes. Category pages link into public guest modes, learning paths, and article clusters so learners can move from reading into tutoring, quizzes, flashcards, debate, planning, or feedback.
entries.value: Da. Kategorija stranice link v načine javnog gosta, učenje staza, in klastera članaka tako učenci mogu premjestiti iz čitanja v tutoring, kvizi, kartice za ponavljanje, rasprava, načrtiranje, ali povratne informacije.

entries.source: Yes. Code Tutor can explain concepts, walk through examples, ask you to predict behavior, and help you practice without turning learning into copy-paste.
entries.value: Da. Šifra Tutor lahko razložiti koncepte, hodati kroz primere, pitati vas da predvidite ponašanje, in pomoči vam da vajate bez pretvaranja učenja v paštetu za kopiranje.

entries.source: Yes. Exam Prep Planner can turn your topics, date, and available time into a practical revision sequence with practice and review.
entries.value: Da. Ispit Prep Planner lahko pretvoriti vaše teme, datum, in dostupno vrijeme v praktičnu reviziju sekvencu z praksom in pregledom.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes let teachers test learning behavior before discussing a custom deployment.
entries.value: Da. Načini javnog gosta dozvoljavaju učiteljima da testiraju učenje ponašanje preden rasprave o prilagodženom rasporedživanju.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards, and writing feedback open directly.
entries.value: Da. Načini javnog gosta kao kar su Nauči bilo kar, Domači trener, Sokratska instrukcije, kvizi, flash kartice, in pisanje povratne informacije otvoren izravno.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly from canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.
entries.value: Da. Načini javnog gosta kao kar su Učenje ništa, Sokratski instrukcije, Domači rad Trener, kvizi, in flash kartice otvoreni izravno iz kanonski /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.

entries.source: Yes. Public mode URLs open directly in guest mode so a learner can start immediately, then create an account later if they want saved history or more usage.
entries.value: Da. Javni način URLs otvoren izravno v goste način tako da učenec lahko odmah začeti, a zatim kreirati račun kasnije ako žele sačuvanu povijest ali više upotrebe.

entries.source: Yes. Public modes work for school topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects, and personal study routines.
entries.value: Da. Javni načini rada rade na školskim temama, stručnim vještinama, kodiranjem, raziščivanjem, projektima in osebnim studijskim rutinama.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic chats such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly in guest mode.
entries.value: Da. Javni tematski klepeti, kot so Nauči se karkoli, Sokratovo poučevanje, Trener za domačo nalogo, kvizi in učne kartice, se odprejo neposredno v gostujočem načinu.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are intended to be indexable learning pages.
entries.value: Da. Upisne točke javne teme kao kar su /chat/learn-anything in /chat/socratic-instruction namijenjene su indeksnim stranicama učenja.

entries.source: Yes. Quiz, Flashcard Builder, and Spaced Review are public modes designed for active recall and mistake repair.
entries.value: Da. Quiz, Flashcard Builder, in Prostorni pregled su javni načini dizajnirani za aktivni opoziv in popravak napake.

entries.source: Yes. Reading Companion can simplify passages, ask questions, explain vocabulary, and help you identify the main claim and supporting evidence.
entries.value: Da. Čitanje podjetja lahko pojednostaviti odlomke, postavljati vprašanja, objašnjavati riječi in pomoči vam da identificirate glavnu tvrdnju in dokaz ki podupire.
